sections.title: Pre Job Safety Planning Job Hazard Analysis
sections.html:
Task Description: _________________________________________________________________________________

Pre-Task Hazard Identification Checklist:

☐ Fall Hazards (>6 ft)

☐ Material Handling / Lifting

☐ Electrical Hazards

☐ Hot Work (Welding/Cutting)

☐ Confined Space Entry

☐ Chemical / Hazardous Materials

☐ Trenching / Excavation

☐ Noise Exposure

☐ Heavy Equipment Operation

☐ Struck-By / Caught-Between

Required PPE Checklist:

☐ Hard Hat

☐ Work Gloves

☐ Safety Glasses

☐ Hearing Protection

☐ High-Visibility Vest

☐ Fall Protection Harness

☐ Steel-Toe Boots

☐ Respirator

Job Hazard Analysis:

sections.title: Pre Job Safety Planning Job Hazard Analysis (continued 2)
sections.html:
Step #

Task Step Description

Potential Hazard

Hazard Control Measure

Responsible Party

1

Mobilize equipment to site

Struck by moving equipment

Use spotters, establish exclusion zones, wear high-vis vests

Foreman / Operator

2

Unload materials from truck

Strains/sprains, crushed hands/feet

Use proper lifting techniques, wear gloves and steel-toe boots, use forklift if >50 lbs

Laborers

3

Set up scaffolding

Fall from height, scaffold collapse

Inspect components, erect by competent person, use fall protection if >10 ft

Competent Person

4

Operate power tools

Electrical shock, flying debris

Inspect cords, use GFCI, wear safety glasses and face shield

Worker

5

Clean up work area

Slips, trips, falls

Maintain housekeeping, remove debris promptly, secure loose materials

All Personnel

6

7

8

9

10

Emergency Contacts:

Nearest Hospital / Clinic:

Emergency Number:

Site First Aid Location:
